docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,945.50 FILED BY LINSHI, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT SIINO, JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-22-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIKE LINSHI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE SIINO IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED, ON MAR-22-2021, IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED OCT-21-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIINO, JOE
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT
